creator: ivk@kristal.ru
text:
Hi,

  I've got that problem on another server after rebooting it. Server has 
44-days uptime before.

  FreeBSD mx2.kristal.ru 6.3-STABLE FreeBSD 6.3-STABLE #0: Wed Apr 16 08:19:49 
YAKST 2008     ivk@mx2.kristal.ru:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/SRV3  i386

  kernel panic message:

  Mounting local filesystems:panic: ufs_dirbad: /tmp: baddir ino 2 at offset 
16384: mangled entry

/dev/ad1s1d  /home/bacula/archives ufs  rw,noexec                        0 2
